q.en: What was unusual about the presidential election of 1800?
q.zh: 1800年的总统大选有什么不寻常之处？

options.en: No winner was declared until the House voted 36 times over two months
options.zh: 直到众议院投票36次、耗时两个多月才确定赢家

options.en: Thomas Jefferson won on the very first ballot
options.zh: 托马斯·杰斐逊在第一轮投票中就赢得了选举

options.en: George Washington was elected for a third term
options.zh: 乔治·华盛顿当选第三届总统

options.en: The election was canceled because of a tie
options.zh: 因为平票，选举被取消了

explain.en: Four candidates ran, and after the votes were counted there was no winner. The House of Representatives voted thirty-six times over more than two months before Jefferson was declared the winner.
explain.zh: 四位候选人参选，计票后没有赢家。众议院在两个多月里投票三十六次，才宣布杰斐逊获胜。

q.en: Who insisted that Jefferson write the Declaration of Independence?
q.zh: 是谁坚持让杰斐逊来撰写《独立宣言》的？

options.en: John Adams
options.zh: 约翰·亚当斯

options.en: George Washington
options.zh: 乔治·华盛顿

options.en: Benjamin Franklin
options.zh: 本杰明·富兰克林

options.en: Thomas Paine
options.zh: 托马斯·潘恩

explain.en: At the Second Continental Congress, John Adams knew Jefferson was an exceptional writer and insisted that Jefferson draft the Declaration of Independence.
explain.zh: 在第二届大陆会议上，约翰·亚当斯深知杰斐逊文笔出众，坚持要他起草《独立宣言》。

q.en: Which famous phrase did Jefferson include in the Declaration of Independence?
q.zh: 杰斐逊在《独立宣言》中写下了哪句著名的话？

options.en: "all men are created equal... Life, Liberty and the pursuit of Happiness"
options.zh: “人人生而平等……享有生命、自由和对幸福的追求”

options.en: "give me liberty or give me death"
options.zh: “不自由，毋宁死”

options.en: "a government of the people, by the people"
options.zh: “民有、民治的政府”

options.en: "we have nothing to fear but fear itself"
options.zh: “我们唯一要害怕的就是害怕本身”

explain.en: The book quotes Jefferson's words: "We hold these truths to be self-evident, that all men are created equal, that they are endowed... with... Life, Liberty and the pursuit of Happiness."
explain.zh: 书中引用了杰斐逊的话：“我们认为这些真理是不言而喻的：人人生而平等，造物主赋予他们……生命、自由和对幸福的追求。”

options.en: The dream home Jefferson designed and built on a Virginia mountaintop
options.zh: 杰斐逊在弗吉尼亚一座山顶上自己设计、建造的梦想之家

options.en: The British palace he lived in as a child
options.zh: 他小时候居住的英国宫殿

options.en: The school where he studied law
options.zh: 他学习法律的学校

options.en: The ship that carried him to Europe
options.zh: 载他去欧洲的那艘船

explain.en: In 1769 Jefferson began building his dream home on a mountaintop in Virginia. He designed it himself, named it Monticello, and kept improving it for forty years.
explain.zh: 1769年，杰斐逊在弗吉尼亚的一座山顶上开始建造他的梦想之家，亲自设计，取名蒙蒂塞洛，并持续改建了四十年。

q.en: What did the Louisiana Purchase do for the United States in 1803?
q.zh: 1803年的“路易斯安那购地”给美国带来了什么？

options.en: It doubled the country's size by buying land from France
options.zh: 它从法国购买土地，使国家面积扩大了一倍

options.en: It ended the Revolutionary War
options.zh: 它结束了独立战争

options.en: It freed Jefferson's slaves
options.zh: 它解放了杰斐逊的奴隶

options.en: It created the first public school
options.zh: 它建立了第一所公立学校

explain.en: In 1803 Jefferson doubled the country's size with the Louisiana Purchase from France, extending the western border to the Rocky Mountains. It was the first time so much land was exchanged by two countries without war.
explain.zh: 1803年，杰斐逊从法国购得路易斯安那，使国家面积扩大一倍，西部边界延伸至落基山脉。这是历史上首次两国不通过战争就交换如此大片土地。

q.en: How did Jefferson help the Library of Congress after the British burned it?
q.zh: 在英军烧毁国会图书馆后，杰斐逊是如何帮忙的？

options.en: He sold his own collection of 6,487 books to reopen it
options.zh: 他卖掉了自己6487册藏书，让图书馆重新开放

options.en: He rebuilt the building with his own money
options.zh: 他自掏腰包重建了馆舍

options.en: He wrote new books to replace the lost ones
options.zh: 他写新书来替代被毁的书籍

options.en: He became its first librarian
options.zh: 他成为了首任馆长

explain.en: During the War of 1812 the British burned the Library of Congress. In 1815 Jefferson sold his personal collection of 6,487 books so the library could reopen.
explain.zh: 1812年战争中英军烧毁了国会图书馆。1815年，杰斐逊卖掉自己6487册的私人藏书，使图书馆得以重新开放。

q.en: What does the book say about Jefferson and slavery?
q.zh: 关于杰斐逊与奴隶制，书中是怎么说的？

options.en: He believed slavery was wrong but never freed his own slaves
options.zh: 他认为奴隶制是错误的，却从未解放自己的奴隶

options.en: He freed all his slaves when he became president
options.zh: 他当上总统后解放了所有奴隶

options.en: He never owned any slaves
options.zh: 他从未拥有过奴隶

options.en: He wrote the law that ended slavery
options.zh: 他起草了废除奴隶制的法律

explain.en: The book states that Jefferson believed slavery was wrong, but he never freed his slaves. Slavery was abolished in the United States in 1865, thirty-nine years after he died.
explain.zh: 书中说杰斐逊认为奴隶制是错误的，却从未解放自己的奴隶。美国于1865年（他去世39年后）才废除奴隶制。

q.en: What did Jefferson believe about where government power should lie?
q.zh: 杰斐逊认为政府权力应当集中在哪里？

options.en: The individual states should have the strongest power
options.zh: 各州应当拥有最大的权力

options.en: A king should hold all the power
options.zh: 国王应当掌握全部权力

options.en: Great Britain should rule the colonies
options.zh: 英国应当统治殖民地

options.en: The president should have total control
options.zh: 总统应当拥有绝对控制权

explain.en: Jefferson argued with John Adams about government. Adams wanted a strong central government; Jefferson believed the individual states should have the strongest powers.
explain.zh: 杰斐逊与约翰·亚当斯在政府形式上意见相左。亚当斯主张强大的中央政府，而杰斐逊认为各州应拥有最大权力。

q.en: How long did Jefferson serve as president?
q.zh: 杰斐逊担任了多久的总统？

options.en: Two terms, for a total of eight years
options.zh: 两届，共八年

options.en: One term of four years
options.zh: 一届，四年

options.en: Three terms, for a total of twelve years
options.zh: 三届，共十二年

options.en: Less than one year
options.zh: 不到一年

explain.en: In 1801 Jefferson became the third president and served two terms for a total of eight years, cutting the country's debt in half during that time.
explain.zh: 1801年杰斐逊成为美国第三任总统，连任两届共八年，期间把国家债务削减了一半。

q.en: When did Thomas Jefferson die, and what was notable about that date?
q.zh: 托马斯·杰斐逊何时去世？那个日期有什么特别？

options.en: July 4, 1826, the same day as John Adams and the nation's 50th birthday
options.zh: 1826年7月4日，与约翰·亚当斯同日去世，也是美国建国50周年

options.en: December 3, 1800, Election Day
options.zh: 1800年12月3日，大选日

options.en: July 4, 1776, Independence Day
options.zh: 1776年7月4日，独立日

options.en: January 1, 1772, his wedding day
options.zh: 1772年1月1日，他的结婚日

explain.en: Thomas Jefferson died on July 4, 1826, the same day as John Adams and exactly fifty years after the Declaration of Independence was approved.
explain.zh: 托马斯·杰斐逊于1826年7月4日去世，与约翰·亚当斯同日，也正好是《独立宣言》通过五十周年。

prompt.en: Thomas Jefferson wrote that 'all men are created equal' yet he owned slaves his whole life. Can someone do great things for a country while still making serious mistakes? Explain your view.
prompt.zh: 托马斯·杰斐逊写下“人人生而平等”，却终其一生都拥有奴隶。你认为一个人既能为国家做出伟大贡献，又同时犯下严重错误吗？说说你的看法。

en: List both Jefferson's achievements (Declaration, Louisiana Purchase) and his contradiction (owning slaves).
Think about whether one person's good deeds and bad choices can both be true at the same time.
zh: 列出杰斐逊的成就（独立宣言、路易斯安那购地）和他前后矛盾的行为（拥有奴隶）。
思考一个人的善行与错误选择是否可以同时成立。
